name: Confetti Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper (cut into thin strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the lime juice, olive oil, garlic, chili powder, and salt in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Add the cubed cooked chicken, red bell pepper strips, sliced green onions, chopped cilantro (or parsley), and minced jalapeno peppers to the mixture.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours to allow the flavors to meld together.
4. After chilling, add the cooled rice and avocado chunks to the salad.
5. Toss lightly to combine all ingredients.
6. Serve chilled.
